title: Marketing Cluster Exam
description: Master the key concepts tested on the DECA Marketing Cluster Exam. Organized by the 2026-2027 DECA blueprint.

resources.title: Business Law Article
resources.content: Business Law is an important performance indicator area within DECA marketing exams. Students should understand key terminology, practical business applications, ethical decision making, and how business law affects organizational success. In competitive events, concepts from this unit often appear in role-plays, case studies, and cluster exam questions. Focus on definitions, real-world examples, common business scenarios, and how managers use these concepts to improve performance. When studying, connect classroom knowledge to customer needs, business objectives, and strategic decision making. Strong mastery of business law helps competitors analyze situations, justify recommendations, and communicate professionally.

questions.question: Which statement best describes business law?
Why is business law important in business?
What is the best study strategy for DECA cluster exams?
Business decisions should generally be:
Knowledge of business law is most useful when:
